summary: Create lcs.bridge_signal_output() to bridge outreach.signal_output into lcs.signal_queue with duplicate detection and signal_code->signal_set_hash mapping from lcs.signal_registry; include blocker handling if outreach.signal_output is absent in Neon.

constraints: Replace lcs.bridge_pressure_signals() — do not modify it
Duplicate detection: sovereign_company_id + source_signal_id OR signal_set_hash + run_month
Map signal_code using existing lcs.signal_registry hashes
If outreach.signal_output does not exist in Neon: report blocker referencing outreach migration source
